title: Fermented Cabbage German Salad
description: This sensational dish features raw vegetables fermented to a velvety texture and served with a tangy dressing for a show-off German take on salads.
instructions: Wash the cabbage thoroughly and cut it into quarters.
Place each quarter in a zip-top bag with enough water to cover. Refrigerate for at least 18 hours, or until fully fermented.
Once fermented, squeeze out excess moisture from the cabbage quarters.
Slice the fermented cabbage finely and set aside.
In a bowl, whisk together vinegar, salt, sugar (optional), and sauerkraut juice to make the dressing.
Toss the sliced fermented cabbage with the dressing for a vibrant, tangy salad.
